blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Skibowl is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,590 ft. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Thursday: 6" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 5" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 8.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 28".
